component.name: EpisodeItem
component.script: sub init() m.bg = m.top.findNode("bg") m.title = m.top.findNode("title") m.subtitle = m.top.findNode("subtitle") m.epnum = m.top.findNode("epnum") end sub sub onContent() c = m.top.itemContent if c = invalid then return m.title.text = c.title m.subtitle.text = c.shortDescriptionLine1 m.epnum.text = c.shortDescriptionLine2 end sub sub onFocus() f = m.top.focusPercent if f >= 0.5 then m.bg.color = "0x202020ff" m.title.color = "0xff2424ff" else m.bg.color = "0x101010ff" m.title.color = "0xffffffff" end if end sub
